ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "maker_address" TEXT /* Address of the user who created the order (maker) */,
  "taker_address" TEXT /* Address of the user who fulfilled the order (taker) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Valid, Executed, Expired) */,
  "expiration_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order will expire */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., Limit, Market) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being traded */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the asset in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the asset in the order */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the order */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the order is visible to other users */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the order has been cancelled */,
  "cancel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "filled_amount" REAL /* Amount of the order that has been filled */,
  "average_filled_price" REAL /* Average price at which the order was filled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_order_type FOREIGN KEY ("order_type") REFERENCES order_types ("order_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_taker_address FOREIGN KEY ("taker_address") REFERENCES users ("user_address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_maker_address FOREIGN KEY ("maker_address") REFERENCES users ("user_address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES order_status ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Maker, Taker, Admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's identity has been verified */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code for user referrals */,
  "referred_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who referred this user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_types" (
  "order_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order type */,
  "order_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the order type (e.g., Limit, Market) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the order type is the default type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status (e.g., Valid, Executed, Expired) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  "is_terminal" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the status is a terminal status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that was executed */,
  "maker_address" TEXT /* Address of the user who created the order (maker) */,
  "taker_address" TEXT /* Address of the user who fulfilled the order (taker) */,
  "trade_amount" REAL /* Amount traded in the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "maker_fee" REAL /* Fee paid by the maker */,
  "taker_fee" REAL /* Fee paid by the taker */,
  "is_disputed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the trade is disputed */,
  "dispute_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the dispute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_maker_address FOREIGN KEY ("maker_address") REFERENCES users ("user_address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_taker_address FOREIGN KEY ("taker_address") REFERENCES users ("user_address")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order related to the notification */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Order Created, Order Expired, Trade Executed) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Maker, Taker, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_name FOREIGN KEY ("role_name") REFERENCES permissions ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., Create Order, View Order, Execute Order) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-permission mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user-permission mapping is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Status Update, Expiration Time Update) */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the change was reverted */,
  "reverted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reverted the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
